name: Grasshopper Brownies Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all brownie ingredients and spread in the greased pan.
4. Bake for 33 to 35 minutes or until set. Cool completely.
5. In a medium bowl, beat 1/2 cup margarine and cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add the remaining filling ingredients; beat until smooth. Spread evenly over the cooled brownies.
6. In a small saucepan, melt frosting ingredients over low heat until smooth, stirring constantly.
7. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes. Pour the frosting evenly over the filling and spread carefully to cover.
8. Refrigerate for 1 hour before cutting into bars. Garnish as desired. Store in the refrigerator.
